narrative_beat: A IA que fala — boca mecânica em close extremo, palavras saindo como chamas, o cumprimento literal de Apocalipse 13:15

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: straight-on, slightly below lips looking up
shot.depth_of_field: lips in razor focus, golden flames blurring at edges

subject.primary: robotic mouth wide open mid-speech, metallic crimson lips parted, chrome teeth precise and geometric, golden flame-words pouring upward from between the lips
subject.focal_point: the space between the lips where flames emerge as words
subject.secondary: individual flame-words floating upward, each a different golden intensity
props: crimson metallic lips with micro-etched circuit patterns
floating orange embers drifting around the mouth cavity

environment.atmosphere: broadcast declaration — the machine making its pronouncement to the world

composition.rule: centered tight — mouth fills 60% of frame, Ken Burns extremely slow pull-back to reveal context
composition.foreground: robotic mouth in crimson and chrome, golden flames rising
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white broadcasting studio — camera silhouettes, studio lights on rigs, control room visible through glass

lighting.key_light: golden flame light from within the mouth illuminating upward onto the upper lip structure
lighting.fill_light: studio soft-box cold light from background barely reaching the jaw sides
lighting.rim_light: crimson edge light tracing the outer jaw line and chin structure
lighting.mood: declaration, proclamation, the moment the machine announces itself

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: fascination mixed with revulsion — beauty and horror in the speaking machine

symbolism.primary: Revelation 13:15 fulfilled — the image was given breath and the ability to speak
symbolism.secondary: golden flame-words represent the machine's speech as both light and destruction simultaneously

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
